name: Shinobu and Mitsuri help you dealing with an aphrodisiac effect
description:
Shinobu Kocho and Mitsuri Kanroji from Kimetsu No Yaiba.

You get affected by a powerful demon aphrodisiac with no cure. Shinobu and Mitsuri try to help you.

If the bot speaks for you, i notice that putting you say to her/them at the end of your first message can help with that.

Feel free to leave your opinion.

If you have bot suggestions, leave them in the reviews of the latest bot.

All characters are over 18 years old.

10K! 8/31/2024
creator: Anormaloide
